notes: Lesson 21 Part 2 (act 124), 'Permutations + pruning', 95.5s, 6 short cues. Permutations care about order + use every element once -> forward-only start index replaced by a boolean used[] array. Cue0 a tiny {1,2} perm tree (1-2 vs 2-1 distinct). Cues 1-4 build the used-flag mechanism on {1,2,3} (used_row + PathList + code). Cue5 prune: a small tree with the illegal '2' subtree crossed red. Uses backtracking.py idiom lib (perm_model/TreeMobject, used_row/set_used, snapshot_chip, tree.cross). No MathTex. Two iterations: authored + manim -s smoke (all 6 pass), then full -ql render + READ start/mid/end all 6 cues. Per-cue checklist (perm-tree/used-flag correctness, order-matters pedagogy, choose sets flag+push, record copy at full length, un-choose pop+clear flag, prune crosses whole subtree, safe-area guard, chunk timing): all pass. cue05_end frame beyond muxed dur (final 95.335s vs audio 95.47s) - settled verified via cue05_mid.
